creator: lenthe@comcast.net
text:
Getting this error when trying to build and install ksh93 from ports:

yoda# cd /usr/ports/shells/ksh93
yoda# make install
===>  Installing for ksh93-20090505
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if shells/ksh93 already installed
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 555 /usr/ports/shells/ksh93/work/arch/freebsd8.amd64/bin/ksh /usr/local/bin/ksh93
install: /usr/ports/shells/ksh93/work/arch/freebsd8.amd64/bin/ksh: No such file or directory
*** Error code 71

How-To-Repeat: Try to install ksh93 from ports on FreeBSD 8.0.
